### 3b. Different Name, Identical Structure

These types have different names but *exactly the same keys* — strong candidates for unification:

- `BugReportBody` (packages/agent/src/api/bug-report-routes.ts:44) ↔ `BugReportForm` (packages/app-core/src/components/BugReportModal.tsx:21)
  - Keys: `description`, `stepsToReproduce`, `expectedBehavior`, `actualBehavior`, `environment`, `nodeVersion`, `modelProvider`, `logs`
- `CharacterParseIssueLike` (packages/agent/src/api/character-routes.ts:45) ↔ `ConfigValidationIssue` (packages/agent/src/config/types.eliza.ts:790)
  - Keys: `path`, `message`
- `CharacterParseIssueLike` (packages/agent/src/api/character-routes.ts:45) ↔ `ConfigSnapshotIssue` (packages/app-core/src/types/index.ts:278)
  - Keys: `path`, `message`
- `CharacterParseIssueLike` (packages/agent/src/api/character-routes.ts:45) ↔ `ConfigValidationIssue` (packages/shared/src/config/types.eliza.ts:784)

- `IntegrationTelemetrySpanLike` (packages/agent/src/api/cloud-routes.ts:55) ↔ `IntegrationTelemetrySpan` (packages/agent/src/diagnostics/integration-observability.ts:43)
